title: Basic JavaScript Currying
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Currying. Focus on implementing Currying definition correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Currying
description: Create a function that uses Currying definition and Manual currying implementation together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Currying Project
description: Build a small application that applies Currying definition, Manual currying implementation, Currying with bind() in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Currying
description: The following code has bugs related to Currying definition. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Currying
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Currying definition and Manual currying implementation.
